description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsTeal tri fold mercer wallet that has a flap two buttoned closure, two insert pockets on the right side with eight card holders, one inner flap with an id card holder and one insert pocket, four card holders on the inside of the flap, one insert pocket on the left side, a zipped pocket at the back, stitch detailing and brand name embossed on the frontMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:10 cm x 18 cm
